entry.title: Capturing moisture losses during storage.
entry.content: Certain materials are getting weight loss (moisture) at the time of storage. Grain by doing sorting/drying/ cleaning (through production order) each variant stored in separated storage location. In the storage weight getting loss (currently we do inventory adjustment). In SAP what is the solution that you can propose on this.

entry.title: concatenate hrpad23 fields to validate with dbtablog abap 7.4
entry.content:
I am new to working with SAP Hana and I have not been able to solve the following problem:

I need to obtain the data from the hrpad23 table but only those that are in the dbtablog table. The problem is that to connect both tables I need to CONCATENATE the fields HRPAD23~MANDT and HRPAD23~ADATANR to compare it with the DBTABLOG~LOGKEY field, the limitations of the version abap with opensql does not allow me to CONCATENATE  in the sql statement (select)
I need help to be able to carry out this process in some way.

attentive to your comments.

Thank you

Juan Leiva

entry.title: Re: OpenUI5 webapp, how to logoff from local odataV2 serv...
entry.content:
Nice to see you try our UI5 platform as well as a React developer!

Do you have a standard application or do you use the launchpad functionality as well?

If you are using the launchpad also, you could trigger a logout sap.ushell.Container.logout()

Maybe you can invalidate your session somehow. It is stored in your session cookies indeed. 

(https://www.npmjs.com/package/ui5-middleware-simpleproxy)

I have never seen this use case in UI5 to be honest 🙂

entry.title: SAP HANA Database - Adjust Memory Allocation Limit
entry.content:
Hello.

I have questions about HANA Database Memory Administration.

 

If I change the allocationlimit parameter in the Production tenant DB, do I have to restart that DB?

I wonder if the changes in the parameter can be applied without restart.

My guess is that due to the current limit, delta merge in tables is not being carried out normally.
The error is "column store error: [2484] not enough memory for table optimization".

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: OpenUI5 webapp, how to logoff from local odataV2 serv...
entry.content: Standard webapp, build with easy ui5 generator.

entry.title: Re: Information about SAP BODS and Salesforce API Compati...
entry.content:
Hi,

no, unfortunately this is not possible anymore. The latest supported Version is v21.

https://me.sap.com/notes/0003004914

You might want to look at a 3rd party Adapter as mentioned in the note.

Julian

entry.title: how to change the delivery address
entry.content:
We have received the following notice from SAP via Email.
 [SAP Customer Data Cloud] Final Reminder - Deprecation of ECMAScript 5.1 for Dataflow Custom Scripts

I would like to know how to change the delivery address.

entry.title: Automatic Language translations for user texts (PO,SO, FI) during postings
entry.content:
Dear Team, 

As we know global implementations involve cultural and language issues, in a global environment (engaging multiple countries), the requirement is that in a specific country user will be entering texts in local language (say Spanish), but Head office is in English speaking territory. For review purposes or group level accounting postings or central shared services, HO team cannot understand the nature of entry (Line item texts of FI documents, or interpret Sales order texts) entered in the local language (spanish or non-english language). Is there any tool or solution of SAP that will work as Digital translator, and during any document save (PO,SO, accounting documents in particular), it should translate texts to english language also whenever someone logs in with EN language set, but at the same time, if someone logs in with SP (Spanish) language code, spanish text should be available (for the local users). How to manage this scenario?

entry.title: Re: Sales Performance Management Q2 2024 Release: A Leap Forward in Innovation
entry.content:
Hi ,

informative blog . 

Regards , 

Azmath.

entry.title: Re: OpenUI5 webapp, how to logoff from local odataV2 serv...
entry.content: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/sapui5-logout-of-sap-gw-using-standard-service/qaq-p/11516230

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content:
Hello 👏,
I am Gautam, from Germany. I have started to learn SAP. Happy to connect with you all 🙂 Please share your journey and motivation to learn SAP. I would like to hear from you. 🙂

entry.title: Re: connection between sap btp and a s/4 hana cloud priva...
entry.content:
@MaximoSanchez ,

"Do I need to implement the Communication Systems application to connect BTP with my S/4 HANA system?"

Yes, you need to configure Communication Systems in SAP S/4HANA Cloud to establish a connection with SAP BTP. This setup defines the technical details necessary for communication, for example hostname, identity, user information and certificates.

"Do I need Cloud Connector for connecting BTP with S/4 HANA Cloud Private and S/4 HANA on-premise but not for S/4 HANA Cloud Public?"

Correct. With the cloud connector, you are able to connect your on-premises systems and other cloud systems.

entry.title: Re: How to hide table columns dynamically in Fiori Elemen...
entry.content:
Hi Sandeep,
Thank you very much for your response.
Could we achieve this using Flexible programming model? or Would it be better to go with Freestyle approach? Please clarify.
Regards,
venkatesh

entry.title: Re: Move field symbols of type any to internal table type standard
entry.content:
Above solution did not work for me since I just need to move from field symbol to deep structure.

Specify the type with the corresponding:

  FIELD-SYMBOLS : <lfs_any> TYPE any & IM_DATA_CONTAINER TYPE REF TO DATA

    ASSIGN im_data_container->* TO <lfs_any>.
    IF <lfs_any> IS ASSIGNED.    ex_form_data = CORRESPONDING YLC_SD_ORDER_CONFIRMATION( DEEP EXACT <lfs_any> ).

entry.title: The system URL is using a self-signed security certificate !
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts !

I'm trying to configure  Development system in Visual studio code from last 3 moths but unable to do it. I have cross-checked this issue with IT team, BASIS team no one is able to resolve it. even i have raise the issue to SAP but we did not receive the correct solution from SAP, the issue is still pending, i hope will get solution from your side. kindly find below errors which displayed on the VS code screen while configuring Development system.

1. When we check with development system URL

 

2. When we check with IP address,

Note : We are entering correct information for User Name, Password, Client name and URL, due to some reasons need to hide details on the screen-shots. 

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Re: OpenUI5 webapp, how to logoff from local odataV2 serv...
entry.content: I've tried this method but when I fetch: <localServer:host>/sap/public/bc/icf/logoff, and clean cookies I get information about logoff on the screen but when I refresh the page I'm still logged in.

entry.title: Re: Assign multiple Sales Employee to a Business Partner,...
entry.content:
Hello,

I was looking into your case and I think you could use the option of "Referenced Document" and within that, use the option of "External Documents." You can then use a formatted search in the "Document Number" field; this formatted search will bring in the sales person's code. In the comments field, you can put either the sales person's name or the type of salesperson (Sales Person, Service, Technician).

From there, you could generate a report by invoice of the people involved in the process.

If you have any questions, write to me and we can look into it specifically. I did an exercise in my database and it worked for me.

 

Best regards,

Lenin

entry.title: Re: Duplication of Target Nodes in Integration Advisor (Leaf Nodes)
entry.content:
Hi ,

Insightful Chronicles. 

Regards ,

Azmath.

entry.title: Re: Modify Z* Db table not working
entry.content: @ricky_shaw It's sy-subrc = 0 because the insertion or the modification succeeded (anyway, it's very exceptional that sy-subrc <> 0). The only problem is that you're not able to diagnose what happened after (rollbacked, deleted, key updated, or looking at it at the wrong moment, etc.) There are many ways to diagnose.

entry.title: .NET USING SAP HANA DB REAL_VECTOR
entry.content:
Hello,

when i create a table with .NET i get the error: "sql syntax error: incorrect syntax near "REAL_VECTOR": line 1 col 50 (at pos 50)'"

I think i have the newest version of libadonet.dll (2.20.22.39682).

Here my example code:

var connection = new HanaConnection(_connectionString);
connection.Open();

var command = new HanaCommand($"CREATE COLUMN TABLE VECTORTAB (ID NVARCHAR, DATA REAL_VECTOR);", connection);
command.ExecuteNonQuery();

connection.Close();

Is it not possible to use the new Datatype REAL_VECTOR?

Greetings,
Andreas

entry.title: Re: OpenUI5 webapp, how to logoff from local odataV2 serv...
entry.content: The middleware simple proxy is using Express. Check out https://github.com/ui5-community/ui5-ecosystem-showcase/issues and maybe raise a question there.

entry.title: The Procurement Monthly - June 2024
entry.content:
Summary

The reports were good again this month!

Great range this month, from the importance (and challenges of AI) to the evolution of category management and the future direction of external workforce.

What is interesting is how well many of these reports tie into the economist research covered last month.  

Gartner CPO E Book

This key issue guide from Gartner looks at 3 top issues impacting CPO and their teams. Namely

Gen AI – Where and when to prioritise investments.

Change Fatigue – Balance aspirations with frameworks to overcome fatigue.

Procurement Transformation – Faster than ever.

The prism that is used to describe the value v feasibility of the Gen AI opportunities is excellent, though id argue the feasibility is linked to maturity of the function and the tech stack,

I really like the visual showing how much more complex the procurement value proposition has become and linking this to the change framework is a useful idea.

And a nice stat to finish!

Chief Procurement Officers who design simplicity into procurement transformations enjoy a 42% increase in transformation success over those who don’t.

GEP AI Guide for procurement transformation

Continuing the AI theme this research covers insights into the importance of AI for competitive advantage.

After recently attending the world procurement congress many conversations centred around this topic, and how to prioritise, what are the benefits where are the constraints what are the positive and negative impacts, and where could it lead?  

The research that in terms of adoption, the landscape is diverse across multiple stages of adoption from exploration, pilots and implementations, I think showcasing the newness and polarising views that many have.

Barriers have been written about previously, notably in a world commerce and contracting paper earlier this year however its interesting to note the consistency around data management, technology itself and cultural implications. 

“Culture eats strategy for breakfast”.

Cultural resistance within organizations is a notable challenge, identified by 36% of professionals. Overcoming apprehension or reluctance towards AI adoption is essential for the successful integration of AI into procurement processes.

Much has also been written about automation and augmentation. This shows up again here with 42% identifying automation assistance as a key outcome, and the same number identifying augmentation (enhancement) as an outcome.

As identified In the barriers section data was a big barrier and the report has a readiness section on infrastructure, that again shows a very diffused readiness landscape. 26% working with basic digital systems that need an overhaul and 21% are starting at the beginning. Perhaps this is a key driver of the recent Economist Impact report that identified that Digitalisation was a top priority for procurement in the  next 12-18 months.

Another big takeaway both from this report and also the events recently has been the AI Skill sets, and this is covered in this report identifying that 31% have some familiarity with AI and 19% have none. Skills and how to develop them, will be at the forefront of many procurement leaders’ agendas, as it has been for some time.

Kearny COO Report

This study is 2nd study done by Kearny into the COO’s. Reason I’m including is that it does give some valuable insights into organisations that procurement leaders will need to consider their alignment, and as pointed out by the recent Economist impact research, CPO now report into COO more than previously!

Some key takeaways:

Over 90% of respondents are prioritising ew customers and new channels to drive growth

51% of COO are targeting 5-7% cost savings in 2024 (and 22% targeting 8-9%)!

Cost still wins v risk but the gap is closing across 4 areas (Inventory, single sourcing, nearshoring, transportation)

70% (an increase over previous year) identified forming alliances with key existing suppliers as the top way to mitigation inflation.

 AQPC Spend Analysis

AQPC have produced 2 pieces around spend analysis. Spend analysis was identified by the Economist as the top driver of digitalisation in procurement for the last 2 years so its worthwhile taking a look at this.

The current state document identifies that 43% of respondents indicated their classification is semi automate and 48% automated, and 47% report that their data cleanings is semi aut0omated and the same number fully automated. As per the GEP report earlier, 60% if respondents identified a significant or very significant impact of data quality on their outcomes, confirming the core essentiality of spend data.

The what to do about it article identifies steps to improve spend data quality, from standardisation of coding systems, to full automation of spend analysis and cleanliness

AQPC AP Benchmarks

The cross industry AP key benchmarks report was also released by AQPC this month and is a great resource to benchmark against. I have compared these v the SAP Ariba Benchmarks and (depending on your view on DPO) shows the improved performance that SAP can deliver v these benchmarks.

 

 

SIA Workforce Buyer Survey

This is an annual study, and ive compared this with last year as its interesting to not some of the changes.

In terms of who owns contingent labour programs, it has moved a little more toward being HR focused, compared to 2023 with 49% stating its HR compared with 46% last year. Procurement was selected 37%.

You may remember from last year we asked the same question in the Economist research for large enterprises it was 42/40 for HR and procurement. Overall (including mid-sized) it was 46/30, and whilst the SIA report doesn’t give org revenue sizes it does give contingent labour sizes and it is more skewed toward LE than mid-sized

Looking at the size of contingent labour again I show the comparison with last year which shows that if you look just at the SIA numbers, they are meeting what they said the previous year with 21% today, 22% in 2 years from 2023 and in 2024 today is at then 22% indicated to be hit in 2 years from last year.

Both have around 26/27% in 10 years’ time. These % represent the % of workforce that is contingent.

When we look at the Economist data, we see it as a % of org spend, and it shows that its between 5-15% of total org spend (including employee spend) and that is shared by 75% of 2300 respondents. To put that in perspective if an org spend is $1billion, then they will spend between 50 million and 150 million on their contingent workforce spend and according to SIA that number is growing every year.

So why is it growing?! What are the priorities for contingent workforce –

According to the report, reducing and controlling costs is the top answer and then implementing technology to manage (and deliver) those cost savings.

Within the Economist research we asked a similar question (with differing options) and the top answer from a contingent perspective was balancing internal and external workers and direct sourcing.

You can see the balancing twice in the priorities from the SIA report – Integrating into corporate planning and total talent management.

SIA reports on direct sourcing separately, and interesting in the Economist direct sourcing was identified by 62% of respondents as the top priority in the next 3-5 years (and 59% of CHRO) and you can see the expected growth in that area from 12% today, to 27% in 10 years’ time, suggesting that direct sourcing and talent networks will be more heavily relied upon in the future.

Category Management – Future Purchasing

This report is a biannual report into Category management which as you will know has consistently appeared in the Economist  surveys as both a driver of digitation (4th this year) and as a top tech trend to be implemented in next 12 -18 months (top last year 4th this year).

The report is detailed, and has some interesting insights:

The trend for leaders and starters has been a reduction in their category management capability index scores (by 9% for leaders and 5% for improvers). This may be due to the sample of respondents, additional questions we have asked, or a slight removal of focus on category management while dealing with operational challenges, but there is an overall trend downwards of some outcomes.

  • This year 86% said stakeholders didn’t know their role, 2 years ago it was 80%
  • Ave savings rate fallen from 7.4 to 7.1%. But this is likely due to inflation.
  • Ave spend per cat man is 101M Euro up from 73m Euro.
  • Interesting that technical category management skills is the number one area to improve 2 years ago it was behavioural skills.
  • 68% of value remains untapped.

The team at future purchasing have segmented their 300+ responses into an order based on outcomes generated and essentially this is the starters (majority of respondents at 74%), improvers the next 19% and leaders which are the top 7%

Early in the report is a summary of some key metrics:

Spend per supplier: Category management is often thought of as a mechanism to increase leverage through consolidation. It is notable that the spend per supplier for leaders of €1.06m is 5x that of starters and 3x that of improvers. This concentration of spend not only increases leverage but also allows increased intensity of SRM improvement activity with key suppliers — an additional source of value that leaders can access.

Spend per procurement team head: The efficiency of the leaders is demonstrated by the fact that €76m spend is managed per member of the procurement team, versus €34m for starters and €27m for improvers. This equates to 55% and 64% fewer resources for the spend managed — reducing the cost to procure. The drop-off in efficiency for improvers versus starters is consistent with previous surveys and may be due to the intensity which they are pursuing value delivery, i.e., effectiveness versus procurement team efficiency.

% of staff focused on category management: Leaders have a higher percentage of staff focused on category management than starters or improvers (43% vs 32% and 36%). Hence, they have more time to spend creating and actioning high quality category strategies, engaging stakeholders, and strategically managing suppliers.

Spend per category manager: Leaders’ category managers are responsible for €177m spend versus €106m for starters and €75m for improvers. This equates to 40% and 58% fewer category managers for the spend managed and reinforces the resource efficiency of leaders.

Looking at overall capability

HIGHEST SCORING CAPABILITY AREA

Across all maturity groups, CatMan strategy is the highest-scoring dimension, with an average of 3.2. This may be a result of Procurement being able to control most of the levers in this area.

LOWEST SCORING CAPABILITY AREA

Stakeholder engagement is the dimension with the joint lowest average score, at 2.7. Practices in this dimension are critical for procurement teams to influence, such as stakeholders having sufficient time for category management, making it a core business process for stakeholders, and category strategies being co-created with business stakeholders.

The joint lowest score is process & technology where even leaders show a considerable variation in the way that category management is deployed. Building a strong process and ensuring consistency of application through good governance and review can help significantly with quality, stakeholder communications, and adoption.

Interestingly process management was the 2nd highest response in improvements needed in category management for CPOs in the latest Economist research.

Ive pulled out three interesting stats from the tech section of the report:

86% of improvers (and 100% of leaders) include process change and supplier management, as well as sourcing in their implementation options versus 47% in our process, category of starters, showing that as organisations become more mature their strategic options expand away from just sourcing.

34% of improvers (and 50% of leaders) use a digitalised category management process & toolkit versus 8% of starters.

14% of improvers (and 20% of leaders) have a category management process and toolkit that uses artificial intelligence to recommend value levers versus 5% our category management of starters.

 

As always reach out to discuss more, and always happy to hear your thoughts!

entry.title: Re: Assign IM mouvement to WM - Check table T156SY: entry...
entry.content: I think it's wiser to try another solution. I'm going to modify my BAPI parameters to work on a row that already exists in the table.

entry.title: Starting and shutting down Appliance from AWS console
entry.content:
Hello,

we recently activated ABAP Platform 1909 Appliance on AWS resulting in two instances, Windows Frontend and ABAP Server. 

I was wondering if there were any contraindications to starting and shutting down the Appliance instances directly from the AWS console instead of from SAP CAL. During the installation, an instance for Windows Frontend was also activated since we could not uncheck the corresponding item; we almost never use it, so, when the appliance is up and running, for cost reasons we sometimes shut down it directly from AWS.

This doesn't seem to cause any problems so far.

What about ABAP server ? Can we do the same from AWS ?

Thank you in advance for any contribution.

Regards.

entry.title: Re: OpenUI5 webapp, how to logoff from local odataV2 serv...
entry.content: thank you, I will! Have a nice day 🙂

entry.title: Interested in Digital Skills Initiative Opportunity For SAP Learning
entry.content:
Hi David_Chaviano,

I hope this message finds you well. Firstly, I'd like to express my gratitude for launching the digital skills initiative through SAP Learning. It's a fantastic opportunity, and I'm eager to be a part of it. The opportunity to delve deeper into SAP MM, particularly in the context of its applications within the real estate sector, resonates strongly with my career aspirations.

I'm writing to express my keen interest in participating in the digital skills initiative offered by SAP Learning. The opportunity to enhance my skills and knowledge in the realm of information technology is something I'm genuinely excited about.

A bit about myself:

  • Name : Aishwarya Patil
  • Location : India
  • Professional Background : I come from a civil engineering background, where I have accumulated valuable experience in the real estate industry. However, I am now eager to make a strategic career shift towards specializing in SAP MM & SAP S/4HANA Sourcing & Procurement to enhance my contributions within this field.

Reason for Career Switch: The decision to transition from civil engineering to SAP MM is rooted in recognizing the transformative potential of technology in optimizing real estate operations. SAP MM, with its robust capabilities in materials management and procurement, presents an invaluable tool for streamlining processes and enhancing efficiency in the real estate sector. I believe that my analytical mindset, attention to detail, and problem-solving skills will serve me well in this new endeavour.

I fall under the category of women.

I'm keen on learning and updating my skills, particularly in the following areas :

  • SAP MM
  • SAP S/4HANA Sourcing and Procurement

 

Why I'm a Good Fit : My background in civil engineering equips me with a comprehensive understanding of the intricacies involved in real estate projects. By complementing this experience with proficiency in SAP MM, I aim to leverage technology to address key challenges faced by the industry, such as inventory management, vendor relations, and cost control. I am confident that my blend of domain knowledge and eagerness to embrace new technologies makes me well-suited to thrive in this program.

I am genuinely enthusiastic about the prospect of participating in the digital skills initiative and believe that it will empower me to make meaningful contributions to the real estate sector through the strategic application of SAP MM. Please consider this as my formal expression of interest, and I eagerly await the registration link. Your support in this regard would be immensely appreciated.

Thank you for considering my application.

Warm regards,

Aishwarya Patil

entry.title: Re: Convert Json format date to SAP readable format
entry.content: The transformation is done implicitly by Simple Transformation format(ticks) and others. https://help.sap.com/doc/abapdocu_latest_index_htm/latest/en-US/index.htm?file=abenst_option_format.htm#!ABAP_ADDITION_1@1@

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Dear David,

My name is Ravi. I am working as Sourcing and Procurement consultant

I'm eager to take a free certification attempt because I believe it will help me learn more and become better at what I do and provide me an advantage to grow in the market.

Regards,

Ravi.

entry.title: Statement is not accessible.
entry.content:
Hi Masters,


I'm just a beginner at "Enhancement".
I want to create "enhancement" by clicking "Create Implementation" in the "ENHANCEMENT-POINT" line.

I cannot activate the "ZQM_ENH_MQEVAI10_RQEVA_CHANGE" enhancement I just created. "Statement is not accessible." I get an error.

Can you help me ?

 



Thanks.

entry.title: Difference between regacy data and migrated data to S4 in purchase info record.
entry.content:
We migrated the purchase info record master data using Migration Cockpit in S4HANA Cloud, we found somes item values are different from regacy data which we described in migration template file.

Target items are as below.
・Responsible Sales Representative (techical name : "VERKF")
->There is a case that the item "Responsible sales person" in the general information sheet is not entered in the template file, but the item of the migrated data is entered automatically.

・Difference in the item "Amount" in the condition table
->There is a case that the item "amount" at condition sheet in the template file is different from the migrated data.
It seems that the value is registered in SAP multiplied by 100.

entry.title: Re: Re-triggering Approval Flow Only on Price Increase fo...
entry.content:
Dear @VijayRawal,

triggering the restart of a workflow for PR and PO can be defined in configuration.

Please have a look at following SSCUIs:

SSCUI 103345: Manage Conditions to Restart Flexible Workflow for Purchase Orders

SSCUI 102888: Manage Conditions to Restart Flexible Workflow for Purchase Requisitions

In addition to that you could use the following BADIs:

PR: MM_PUR_S4_PR_WFL_RESTART

PO: MMPUR_PO_WORKFLOW_RESTART

 

best regards,

Marius

entry.title: How do we confirm yield and scrap manually in workcenter POD
Configuring external IDE(BAS) in Eclipse for creating Fiori Project
entry.content:
How to configure Business application studio to Eclipse as external IDE for creating FIORI project

I'm using ABAP on Cloud environment in Eclipse

I have different versions, but there is no requirement for the month even though the month is duplicated.

please find the screenshot and provide some suggestions for the cause.

entry.title: Re: Statement is not accessible.
entry.content: Please paste the code of the include.

entry.title: Why Choose For $100 Temu COUPON CODE [taj58794]?
entry.content:
Choosing a $100 Temu Coupon Code, specifically [taj58794], can offer several benefits:

  1. Significant Savings: A $100 coupon provides substantial savings on your purchase, allowing you to buy more items or higher-quality products within your budget.

  2. Exclusive Offers: Coupon codes like [taj58794] often come with exclusive deals and discounts that aren't available to the general public, giving you access to special promotions.

  3. Encourages Tryouts: If you're new to Temu, this coupon code can incentivize you to try their products and services with reduced financial risk.

  4. Budget-Friendly: Using a high-value coupon code can make premium products more affordable, helping you get the best value for your money.

  5. Easy Application: The coupon code [taj58794] can typically be easily applied during checkout, making the process straightforward and hassle-free.

  6. Gift Potential: A $100 coupon can also be a thoughtful gift for someone, allowing them to choose what they want from Temu's offerings.

When using the coupon code [taj58794], ensure you check the terms and conditions, such as expiration dates and any applicable restrictions, to maximize its benefits.

entry.title: Re: How to display landed cost of multiped PO
entry.content:
Dear @gaurav-chauhan,

there are some apps available from which you can get this data, e.g.:

  • Monitor Purchase Order Items
  • Purchasing Spend
  • Purchase Order Value and Scheduling Agreement Value

 

best regards.

Marius

entry.title: Re: Assembly data cant be found in Work center POD.
entry.content:
Hello Sayuj,

if your material is a component of the order Bill of Material, then you must maintain the assembly data type at the component within Manage Bills of Material application. Please find an example screenshot below.

Best regards, Harry

entry.title: Re: Request for digital skills initiative by SAP Learning
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano , i have change the privacy settings. Please share the invite.
i am very excited to join the SAP community....
P.S.- Thank you so much for providing me this invaluable opportunity and providing me the equal opportunity as a human without any bias.

entry.title: Re: How to post a transactional data by using statistical...
entry.content:
Hi Yaswanthkarnam,

You can get an overview of the available document types in SAP Help:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/4ebf1502064b406c964b0911adfb3f01/488c7267e6ab45eba2aba706b53d38ed.html

In there you have a column documenting which document types allow for quantity:

If you don't find one that fits you can always create your own.

If you want to use the provided document types you can use DT = 01 and post through Post Group Journal Entries app. If you have Group Reporting Data Collection use can use an input form and use DT = 03.

Br

Martin Jul

entry.title: Re: ADT : Error trying to open object of ATC remote check
entry.content:
Dear customer,

thank you for reporting this issue.

Please create a customer ticket using component BC-DWB-AIE-QTT.

Please provide detailed information to reproduce the issue, such as what were your steps in details, such as error message or protocols etc.

Which ADT client version do you use? See Help > About ABAP Development Tools from the menu.
You can find the latest client  on: https://tools.hana.ondemand.com/#abap

Please also provide us the Support zip file. For creation, choose Help > Collect Support Information... from the menu. For further information, see here: 1745015 - Providing Information for ADT to SAP Support

Thank you for your help.

Kind regards,

Wolfgang

entry.title: Re: Statement is not accessible.
entry.content:
Hello,

the issue is what it says = "Statement is not accessible". You are pasting some logic code in between two MODULES. Code in between of them will not run! Because it is simply not called. Modules are called.

But as Thomas says - it may depend on what you have in your Z* include. You can put there (global) data / type definitions, your own custom MODULEs, FORMs, Class definitions etc... but do not expect standalone code run there by itself.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)

I had been a SAP Consultant for more than 2 years

Regards,

Niteesh.

entry.title: Re: Sub-contracting MRP area not showing in MD04
entry.content: Hi @DerekDing, I have checked this both material are having material status as "In use" and deletion indicator is also not activated for the MRP area.

entry.title: Re: SAP SD Voucher request to digital skills for Certification
entry.content: @David_Chaviano  Yes

entry.title: Upgrading to SAP Commerce Cloud 2211.23/2211.24
entry.content:
Hello,

I am still trying to update SAP Commerce Cloud from 2211.20 to 2211.24. According to this (https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_COMMERCE_CLOUD_PUBLIC_CLOUD/75d4c3895cb346008545900bffe851ce/5a001780743a4441a85f4a7d2e043a29.html), Solr 9.5 should now be included within the platform for local development environments. Yet, when I run ant all, it is still trying to download Solr 9.5 and its not using the one from solr-hybris-customizations.

I have also set the following property (only for local environments): solrserver.solr.server.version=9.5.8

Here the log:

     ...
     [echo] building extension 'searchbackoffice'...
     [echo] building extension 'smartedittools'...
     [echo] building extension 'solrfacetsearch'...
     [echo] Skipping all Smartedit extensions build due to smartedittools.only.build.once=true
     [echo] Registered searchbackoffice as SASS extensions
     [echo] Registered searchbackoffice as SASS extensions
     [echo] building extension 'adaptivesearchsolr'...
     [echo] building extension 'customadaptivesearch'...
     [echo] building extension 'solrfacetsearchbackoffice'...
     [echo] Registered solrfacetsearchbackoffice as SASS extensions
     [echo] Registered solrfacetsearchbackoffice as SASS extensions
     [echo] building extension 'adaptivesearchbackoffice'...
     [echo] building extension 'backofficesolrsearch'...
     [echo] building extension 'solrserver'...
     [echo] building extension 'springintegrationlibs'...
     [echo] building extension 'tomcatembeddedserver'...
     [echo] building extension 'ticketsystembackoffice'...
     [echo] building extension 'voucher'...
     [echo] Registered adaptivesearchbackoffice as SASS extensions
     [echo] Registered adaptivesearchbackoffice as SASS extensions
     [echo] Registered ticketsystembackoffice as SASS extensions
     [echo] Registered ticketsystembackoffice as SASS extensions
     [echo] --- Solr customizations 8.11 ---
     [echo] expectedVersion: 8.11.49
     [echo] currentVersion: 8.11.49
     [echo] --- Solr customizations 9.2 ---
     [echo] expectedVersion: 9.2.23
     [echo] currentVersion: 9.2.23
     [echo] --- Solr customizations 9.5 ---
     [echo] expectedVersion: 9.5.8
     [echo] currentVersion: 9.5.8
     [echo] --- Solr server 9.5 ---
     [echo] expectedVersion: 9.5.8
     [echo] currentVersion: 
     [echo] expectedCustomizationsVersion: 9.5.8
     [echo] currentCustomizationsVersion: 
     [echo] Installing Solr server [version=9.5.8, type=zip, customizationsVersion=9.5.8]
[artifact:dependencies] Downloading: org/apache/solr/solr/9.5.8/solr-9.5.8.pom from repository custom_nexus at https://mvn.intern.custom.de/repository
[artifact:dependencies] Error transferring file: mvn.intern.custom.de
[artifact:dependencies] [WARNING] Unable to get resource 'org.apache.solr:solr:pom:9.5.8' from repository custom_nexus (https://mvn.intern.custom.de/repository): Error transferring file: mvn.intern.custom.de
[artifact:dependencies] Downloading: org/apache/solr/solr/9.5.8/solr-9.5.8.pom from repository central at https://repo1.maven.org/maven2
[artifact:dependencies] Unable to locate resource in repository
[artifact:dependencies] [INFO] Unable to find resource 'org.apache.solr:solr:pom:9.5.8' in repository central (https://repo1.maven.org/maven2)
[artifact:dependencies] Downloading: org/apache/solr/solr/9.5.8/solr-9.5.8.zip from repository custom_nexus at https://mvn.intern.custom.de/repository
[artifact:dependencies] Error transferring file: mvn.intern.custom.de
[artifact:dependencies] [WARNING] Unable to get resource 'org.apache.solr:solr:zip:9.5.8' from repository custom_nexus (https://mvn.intern.custom.de/repository): Error transferring file: mvn.intern.custom.de
[artifact:dependencies] Downloading: org/apache/solr/solr/9.5.8/solr-9.5.8.zip from repository central at https://repo1.maven.org/maven2
[artifact:dependencies] Unable to locate resource in repository
[artifact:dependencies] [INFO] Unable to find resource 'org.apache.solr:solr:zip:9.5.8' in repository central (https://repo1.maven.org/maven2)
[artifact:dependencies] An error has occurred while processing the Maven artifact tasks.
[artifact:dependencies]  Diagnosis:
[artifact:dependencies] 
[artifact:dependencies] Unable to resolve artifact: Missing:
[artifact:dependencies] ----------
[artifact:dependencies] 1) org.apache.solr:solr:zip:9.5.8
[artifact:dependencies] 
[artifact:dependencies]   Try downloading the file manually from the project website.
[artifact:dependencies] 
[artifact:dependencies]   Then, install it using the command: 
[artifact:dependencies]       mvn install:install-file -DgroupId=org.apache.solr -DartifactId=solr -Dversion=9.5.8 -Dpackaging=zip -Dfile=/path/to/file
[artifact:dependencies] 
[artifact:dependencies]   Alternatively, if you host your own repository you can deploy the file there: 
[artifact:dependencies]       mvn deploy:deploy-file -DgroupId=org.apache.solr -DartifactId=solr -Dversion=9.5.8 -Dpackaging=zip -Dfile=/path/to/file -Durl=[url] -DrepositoryId=[id]
[artifact:dependencies] 
[artifact:dependencies]   Path to dependency: 
[artifact:dependencies]         1) org.apache.maven:super-pom:pom:2.0
[artifact:dependencies]         2) org.apache.solr:solr:zip:9.5.8
[artifact:dependencies] 
[artifact:dependencies] ----------
[artifact:dependencies] 1 required artifact is missing.
[artifact:dependencies] 
[artifact:dependencies] for artifact: 
[artifact:dependencies]   org.apache.maven:super-pom:pom:2.0
[artifact:dependencies] 
[artifact:dependencies] from the specified remote repositories:
[artifact:dependencies]   central (https://repo1.maven.org/maven2),
[artifact:dependencies]   custom_nexus (https://mvn.intern.custom.de/repository)
[artifact:dependencies] 
[artifact:dependencies] 

BUILD FAILED

/Users/sweis/dev/shop-platform/server/hybris/bin/platform/resources/ant/compiling.xml:95: The following error occurred while executing this line:
/Users/sweis/dev/shop-platform/server/hybris/bin/platform/resources/ant/compiling.xml:136: The following error occurred while executing this line:

/Users/sweis/dev/shop-platform/server/hybris/bin/platform/resources/ant/util.xml:142: The following error occurred while executing this line:
/Users/sweis/dev/shop-platform/server/hybris/bin/modules/search-and-navigation/solrserver/buildcallbacks.xml:164: The following error occurred while executing this line:
/Users/sweis/dev/shop-platform/server/hybris/bin/modules/search-and-navigation/solrserver/buildcallbacks.xml:213: The following error occurred while executing this line:
/Users/sweis/dev/shop-platform/server/hybris/bin/modules/search-and-navigation/solrserver/buildcallbacks.xml:310: The following error occurred while executing this line:
/Users/sweis/dev/shop-platform/server/hybris/bin/modules/search-and-navigation/solrserver/buildcallbacks.xml:412: Unable to resolve artifact: Missing:
----------
1) org.apache.solr:solr:zip:9.5.8

  Try downloading the file manually from the project website.

  Then, install it using the command: 
      mvn install:install-file -DgroupId=org.apache.solr -DartifactId=solr -Dversion=9.5.8 -Dpackaging=zip -Dfile=/path/to/file

  Alternatively, if you host your own repository you can deploy the file there: 
      mvn deploy:deploy-file -DgroupId=org.apache.solr -DartifactId=solr -Dversion=9.5.8 -Dpackaging=zip -Dfile=/path/to/file -Durl=[url] -DrepositoryId=[id]

        1) org.apache.maven:super-pom:pom:2.0
        2) org.apache.solr:solr:zip:9.5.8

----------

  org.apache.maven:super-pom:pom:2.0

from the specified remote repositories:
  central (https://repo1.maven.org/maven2),
  custom_nexus (https://mvn.intern.custom.de/repository)

FAILURE: Build failed with an exception.

* Where:
Script '/Users/sweis/dev/shop-platform/builder/buildsystem/hybris.gradle' line: 554

* What went wrong:
Execution failed for task ':yall'.
> Process 'command 'apache-ant/bin/ant'' finished with non-zero exit value 1

Anyone has an idea what I'm doing wrong?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: Error while trying to assign value to JournalEntry.Al...
entry.content:
Hello Ankit,

I have tried using SAPbobsCom and SDK in separate add-ons and encountered the same problem.
In both cases I added a new reference to the DLL - I have an installation of SAP 10 SP 2402, before using this version I didn't have the property AllocationNumberIL.

Kind regards,

Odele

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Dear @David_Chaviano ,

My name is Pyae Sone, and I am from Myanmar. My professional background is in business development for last-mile delivery. Due to the country's current political situation and economic outlook, I need to relocate overseas and find a job. I am particularly interested in Supply Chain Management and Manufacturing, but most job openings require SAP knowledge. Acquiring this expertise would greatly enhance my ability as I will be switching my career to Manufacturing and Supply Chain. I am confident that I can excel in my future endeavours with this opportunity.

Thank you for considering my application.

Sincerely,
Pyae Sone

entry.title: Re: How to find BDC program name ?
entry.content:
Hello,

I do not think there is any link between SHDB recording and theorethical program generated from it.
It is not mandatory to generate a program from recording. Also someone could generate program and modify the steps afterwards so it will not match.

But anyway - each SHDB recording is calling Transaction code. If you display recording you can see which transaction is called. You can search "Where-used" for this Transaction code in SE93 and possibly find where it is called using BDC (batch input). And then compare the logic with steps in the recording.

entry.title: New SKU of SAP DM targeting GxP Industries
entry.content:
Hi experts, 
 
We attended the SAP Sapphire event virtually and came across the session “SCM100 | Explore the road map for SAP Digital Manufacturing”. We are also targeting the GxP industries and were concerned about the auditing and regulations. In this session, it was stated that a separate SKU was released with 2405 updates last month where SAP will support the above-mentioned concerns.  
 
Question: How to get the new SKU? How will it assist in targeting the GxP-related industries? What are the additional resources and prerequisites related to this specific SKU? 

Please point me to blogs or resources that will help in this matter.  

 

Thanks & Regards, 
Harsh. 

 

SAP Digital Manufacturing @ManoelCosta

entry.title: Re: Create new report/period in SAP Disclosure Management...
entry.content: Hi Felipe,Let’s schedule a meeting. My calendar is open.

Hi Vitaliy,

getting below error.

entry.title: Re: Problem with ALV column displaying as exponent instea...
entry.content:
No bug at my side in 7.40 SP 23

ABAP

SELECT * FROM zcds_view
  UP TO 100 ROWS
  INTO TABLE (alv_table).
cl_salv_table=>factory( IMPORTING r_salv_table = DATA(salv)
                        CHANGING  t_table      = alv_table ).
salv->display( ).

CDS view

define view zcds_view as select from vbap
{
    vbeln, 
    case when vbap.kwmeng = 0 then 0 else vbap.kwmeng end as OpenQty 
}

Output

entry.title: Re: Statement is not accessible.
entry.content: In the program, we have to write our codes between FORM .. ENDFORM. Problem solved, thank you.

entry.title: Re: Failed to commit objects to server : Undefined Info S...
entry.content: Hi Tommyc, no i don't search another solution because this note satisfy me and the customer has accepted the solution.

entry.title: Re: Adobe Form table with Header and Item Data : Nested Tables
entry.content: Hello, what is the question? What have you tried? There are many posts about nested tables in Adobe forms.

entry.title: Follow up issues after GR: You cannot create several dlv.headers in case of external no. assignment
entry.content:
hello ewm community,

the setup is done with ext. no range and sometimes it happens during GR processing starting in ewm (embedded s4) fiori app that more than one PO is handled. Then sap e.g. wants to replicate several delivery headers and this is not possible. But warhouse staff in the meantime seeds physically the stock in gr area and starts the putaway process. Therefore quant connection to this referens inbound delivery in ewm is gone with the effect that you cannot eaaily cancel the inbound delivery order any more. 

 

Questions:

- is this problem gone with internal number ranges?

- if sticking to external no ranges (because it's unclear which side effect may occur in a system that was setup initially from somebody else), how can this be avoided in future? how to avoid to be able to handle multiple po's in parallel in ewm fiori?

- most important: if this happens from time to time: how can this be canceled in a proper way?

 

br

entry.title: Re: Statement is not accessible.
entry.content: I hope you know that the FORM has to be called somewhere afterwards 🙂 Othervise it will not run.

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: Hello @Gautam79 it's great you found your way to SAP Community. As you mentioned you have started to learn SAP, I would like to inform you about our SAP Learning Groups. Here, you can find answers, material, updates and you can even ask your questions. Don't forget to join the groups, to get a notifications once there is new content!

entry.title: issue with multiple discount determination at sales order - same KNUMH
entry.content:
dear community, we have issue with multiple discount determination at sales order - same KNUMH - 11 times discount results in negative customer price

we checked everything from our point of view - nothing what can cause this issue,

issue is not replicable , and seems to appear after credit release update / new pricing triggered

discount condition is related to deal agreement

if someone had such issue in the past and can give me some hints

 

thank you for all input and have a best day!

Thank you

Hi Harry,
Thank for your reply. 
just for my understanding, if this the case then when do we use this method
 Data fields >> Data types (Category: Assembly/Consumption) >> Manage material (Data to Collect at Assembly/Consumption).

Could you please let me know. 
Thank you. 

Regards,
Sayuj.

entry.title: Re: No configuration found for replication of business ob...
entry.content:
Dear,

You can check the below Note from SAP.

Warning Message "No configuration found for replication of business object 194 (Material)" in DRFLOG 

 

Regards,

Jahangir B.

entry.title: Re: Legacy modernization comments
entry.content:
Your points about the continued viability of PowerBuilder in today's tech landscape are interesting, but there are a few key aspects worth considering when discussing modernization.

While in-memory computing can indeed boost performance, it doesn't address the broader issue of maintaining and scaling legacy applications. Modern platforms like Java and .NET provide robust frameworks and tools that can significantly streamline development and maintenance processes. Additionally, these platforms now support in-memory computing natively, further enhancing performance.

4GL tools like PowerBuilder are known for their rapid application development capabilities, but modern development environments have made significant strides. Both Java and .NET offer comprehensive development ecosystems that include powerful IDEs, extensive libraries, and frameworks that can speed up development. Moreover, these platforms are constantly evolving with community and vendor support, ensuring they stay relevant and efficient. Tools like Visual Studio for .NET and IntelliJ IDEA for Java have revolutionized coding efficiency and developer productivity.

The argument that web development tools cannot match the richness of client/server GUIs overlooks the advancements in web technologies. Modern web frameworks (e.g., Angular, React, Blazor) offer sophisticated, responsive, and highly interactive user interfaces that can rival traditional GUIs.

Additionally, web-based applications provide flexibility, accessibility, and easier integration with other services and platforms, which are crucial for enterprise environments. Progressive Web Apps (PWAs) and Single Page Applications (SPAs) are just a few examples of how web technologies have evolved to meet enterprise needs.

For those considering modernization, it's important to weigh the pros and cons of each approach. Consider this informative blog post. This resource can provide deeper insights into why modernizing to Java or .NET could be the right choice for your business needs.

entry.title: Re: Store data about approver and approved object after f...
entry.content:
Hi KKilhavn,

As you said at the end, you need to identify the relevant workflow. A clue, CDS views I_WorkflowTask*

Leading object (your PR), I_WorkflowTaskLeadingApplObj

Result of a step, I_WorkflowStepResult

...

 

Regard

entry.title: Re: NC Disposition via SAPME PAPI: Find Disposition Options
entry.content:
Hi!

In your example, the system returned 2 Disp options in response to a single NcDataBO, however, you are saying "request delivers all possible dispositions" - does it mean that in your system you have only those 2 options for the entire site? If so, where are the rest of predefined Disposition functions - have you deleted them manually? if not, then it looks as if the system returned those 2 options out of many possible for some reason that is likely defined by the setup of your NC Code.

However, if it happened the method does not take NcDataBO into account indeed, then I would see this as a bug. And then you would submit a support ticket with a detailed description of the scenario and setup so that we can fix the issue.

 

Regards,

Sergiy

entry.title: Re: Questions re: "Multi-model with SAP HANA Cloud" developer challenge
entry.content:
Hi @gphadnis2000, This error is in the external package `gensim`, not in my code, so it is a bit difficult for me to say what caused this particular error. Can you check what is there in the directory, where this package downloads the files to, i.e. in `/home/user/gensim-data/`?

Then try deleting that directory

rm -rf /home/user/gensim-data/

and restart that failed cell in the Jupyter Notebook.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano 

I've already turned on private message.

Br,

Emma.tran

entry.title: Re: Understanding SuccessFactors Pay Scale Structure and its related features
entry.content:
Hello and thanks a lot for the detailed showcase of these features,

 

when I use the Tariff Change functionality, I am able to update the pay component amount based on the PayScaleLevel assignment (e.g. going from €100 to €150 in DAILY SALARY) but other rules associated to CompInfo are not being triggered

for example, we have a pay component using an OnSave rule to obtain YEARLY SALARY from DAILY SALARY, but that rule is not getting triggered by the Tariff Changes functionality and so employees will have the new DAILY SALARY but keep the old YEARLY SALARY

 

do you know any workaround for this issue?

entry.title: The Tale of the Disappearing Data: An Epic Developer Saga from the World of CAP 😆
entry.content:
Picture this: you're deep in the trenches of SAP Cloud Application Programming, crafting a shiny new CAP application for a customer. You've sprinkled in some initial master data for rapid prototyping, confident that everything is running smoothly. After some time, you hand over the application to your customer, eagerly awaiting their high-quality master data input using the Fiori Elements UI to prepare for some real world testing.

But as fate would have it, a bug reared its ugly head during testing. No problem, you think! You roll up your sleeves and deploy a bugfix. Victory is imminent...or so it seems. Suddenly, disaster strikes! All the master data is gone, replaced with your initial csv-data. Panic sets in as you remember the infamous HDI deployment caveat for csv data.

You scramble to apologize profusely to the customer, hastily moving all your csv files away from the db folder. Phew, crisis averted! The customer diligently re-enters their high-quality master data, and you prepare for another deployment. But alas, the nightmare isn't over. The master data vanishes again, leaving you bewildered and the customer frustrated.

Determined to conquer this beast, you dive into the depths of the HDI container, deleting the entire instance on Cloud Foundry in a desperate bid to solve the issue once and for all. In the aftermath of this chaos, inspiration strikes. From the ashes of your trials, the HDI Container Backup & Restore Application is born, a testament to the relentless spirit of a developer who refused to let data disappear without a fight.

And thus, a hero emerged from the world of SAP, armed with a new tool and a story to tell at this developer contest. May your backups be ever plentiful, and your data forever safe!

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi David,

I have been working on SAP for the past one year in Ariba Suite.

I want show case my skills brighter with a certificate and as a addition.requesting to consider and provide the free certification attempt as i have completed my learning journey prior.

Thanks&Regards,

VenkataPraveena.

entry.title: Re: HiCan we install SAP Business One Web Client on a ser...
entry.content: That document references the "SAP Business One Administrator's Guide" which says virtually nothing. Prove me wrong, but as far as I've seen the only diversification options are to install the database engine and on one server, the server components (the Web Client is a server component) on a second server, and the more complete Windows SBO Client on the terminal server or PC. Then the network administrator must manage the NAT externally. I think the Apache/Tomcat crap is so convoluted that it forces a monolithic installation process.

entry.title: Delete orphaned tile in Fiori Launchpad
entry.content:
I've created a KPI and a Drilldown Report using the app "Manage KPIs and Reports" (F2814). 
Then I used the "Visualize" tab in the report to create a Launchpad Tile showing some KPI value. I assigned the tile to a catalog and group - everything worked fine, tile was showing on the launchpad.

Later, I decided that I want to remove the tile, report and KPI. I used the app again to delete the report and the KPI. This worked fine, both are gone from the list. The auto-generated tile was not visible on the launchpad anymore. Unfortunatly, after that I realized that in the Launchpad Customizing, the tile is still existing in the catalog. When I click on it, nothing happens. The "Configure" and "Delete" buttons are greyed out:

I understand that you are not supposed to be able to change/delete tiles that are generated by reports from the app. They are supposed to be deleted when the report is deleted, but something must have gone wrong. Now I have this orphaned tile. Any other way to remove this dead tile from the Launchpad Customizing other than editing directly in the database? 

SAP S/4HANA FOUNDATION 2020
SAPUI5: 1.84.7 (202102111006)

entry.title: Re: Submissions for "SAP HANA Cloud multi-model" developer challenge: Week 2 - Words as Ve
entry.content:
Your last example made me scratch my head, and then smile @mvinci 

I checked that EDE is the NYSE's "Empire District Electric Company". So, this is where "Empire" is coming from 🙂 

Maybe you should have tried what is there in "Athens" similar to "pasta" in "Rome"? 😋

How did you find this week's content? Was it helpful to learn anything new?

Please kindly check and proceed my application.

Thank you for your notice.

Best regards,

nguyen_phuong

entry.title: Re: Statement is not accessible.
entry.content: Yes, you are right 🙂 I cannot run the FORM I created because I cannot call "Form". So where should I add "PERFORM ZQM_ENH_MQEVAI10_RQEVA_CHNGE"? I do not know this.

entry.title: Re: How to Bill Freight Costs to Customer in S4/HANA Cloud?
entry.content:
Hi,  thank you for the post. I am currently testing SAP Transportation Management (TM) in a Public Cloud environment and unfortunately, I cannot link freight costs to the billing document. In Public Cloud, I only have the Freight (Manual) condition type, and I have tried using this in my sales order, but it doesn't work. Do you have any other tips?

Additionally, after posting accruals the freight settlement document creation,  purchase order process correctly, but the billing document does not reflect these costs.

entry.title: USERTEXT NCLOB datatype
entry.content:
Hi, 

Can anyone solve this issue. USERTEXT NCLOB when use in group by got issue. How do need to add in group by clause. Can give me some clear solution.

entry.title: No Optimization Server Available (SAP TM)
entry.content:
Good morning,

When our Transport Planners are using the Transportation Cockpit, they were getting error messages which state, "No Optimization Server Available". These messages are then being prefixed with TVSS when creating Freight Orders and TSPS when in the Freight Order and attempting to assign Carriers.

We have refreshed our server, created new scheduled jobs to clear cache/log entries overnight, yet this issue is occurring daily since Monday AM. 

We had a system outage on Sunday for system re-architecture which seems to be the driver for this issue, however we are struggling to identify the root cause and correct it.

This is affecting our Operations team when trying to ship loads.

Would anyone have any advice relating to the Optimization Server and this issue?

Thank you for your help in advance,

Nick

entry.title: Re: Calls for Public CAP-API using BTP Scheduler not working
entry.content:
Find following output from SAP OSS Ticket with answers from BTP Scheduler, XSSEC and CAP Teams.

It was quite difficult to discuss this topic.

From XSSEC team / perspective, there is no error.

As far as CAP team analyzed, they found out that BTP Scheduler instance sends an invalid JWT token to the CAP endpoint. And as all CAP handlers validate the authorization header if there is one (even if public or unprotected), the framework aborts with an validation error. As designed.

From BTP Scheduler team however, the response is that calling a public (unprotected) endpoint from Scheduler is not suppported. And it is not possible to disable the scheduler job from sending this invalid JWT token in the authorization header.

Funny thing is that this case worked for almost one year and then stopped suddenly. Unfortunately the root change has not been found why it stopped working or why it has worked before.

Therefore I close this question and leave it unresolved.

entry.title: Re: Submissions for "SAP HANA Cloud multi-model" developer challenge: Week 2 - Words as Ve
entry.content: The task was extremely guided; the only difficulty was finding words that yielded a meaningful result. I would have preferred a slightly less guided exercise because I retain information better when I have to search a bit on my own rather than simply executing tasks without any reflection. I would have preferred something that looks more to a real challenge.

entry.title: Re: Submissions for "SAP HANA Cloud multi-model" developer challenge: Week 2 - Words as Ve
entry.content:
@Vitaliy-R 
Executing the scripts was straightforward, and I didn't encounter any obstacles. However, I believe it would be more beneficial for learning if there were elements that required us to think and implement solutions on our own.

entry.title: Re: Questions re: "Multi-model with SAP HANA Cloud" developer challenge
entry.content: let me try that option

entry.title: Create a custom section fragment with event handler in Fiori List Report
entry.content:
Hi All, 

I am trying to create a fragment and call handler event inside that, in a Fiori list report template. I am using build code, full stack application.

I tried adding the fragment manually as well as from the Page Floor Plan Editor. I checked few blogs and references for them generate event is coming.

# https://github.com/SAP-samples/fiori-elements-fpm-exercises-codejam/blob/main/chapters/03-custom-section-via-extension-point/readme.md

# https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/unlocking-possibilities-extending-fiori-elements-apps-with-the-flexible/ba-p/13580440

@MioYasutake @mertuytun @PeterSpielvogel

entry.title: Re: Dynamic parallel processing in SAP S/4HANA flexible w...
entry.content:
Hi Sumit, unfortunately I never did a POC on that and actual there is no time for. I found some example coding (but didn´t run it) in our FORMABSENC- Demo Flexworkflow Scenario for the on_creation_callback that may help.

 

DATA(lv_task_id) = io_current_activity->get_task_id( ). IF lv_task_id = 'TS77408433'. 
" The application object could be fetched 
" DATA(lv_appl_obj) = io_context->get_leading_object_reference( ). 
" The following code will set an approval comment depending on the value of a step property 

DATA(lt_step_properties) = io_current_activity->if_swf_flex_ifs_run_component~get_properties( ). 
IF line_exists( lt_step_properties[ id = cl_swf_flex_def_appl_lra=>cs_prop_milestone-id ] ). 
DATA(lo_formabsenc) = CAST cl_swf_formabsenc( cl_swf_formabsenc=>bi_persistent~find_by_lpor( CONV #( io_context->get_leading_object_reference( ) ) ) ). 
IF lo_formabsenc IS NOT BOUND. RAISE EXCEPTION TYPE cx_swf_flex_ifs_run_exception EXPORTING textid = cx_swf_flex_ifs_run_exception=>leading_object_key_error. 
ENDIF. 
DATA(ls_formabsenc) = lo_formabsenc->get_detail( ). 
CASE lt_step_properties[ id = cl_swf_flex_def_appl_lra=>cs_prop_milestone-id ]-value. "value field contains a key (if a fixed value list is used) or the value itself (if no value list is used) WHEN cl_swf_flex_def_appl_lra=>cs_prop_milestone-value_id_1. ls_formabsenc-approval_comment = 'Stage 1 reached' ##NO_TEXT. WHEN cl_swf_flex_def_appl_lra=>cs_prop_milestone-value_id_2. ls_formabsenc-approval_comment = 'Stage 2 reached' ##NO_TEXT. ENDCASE. 
" Update leading object here 
TRY.
lo_formabsenc->update_background( 
EXPORTING
 is_swxformabs = ls_formabsenc iv_do_commit = abap_false ). 
CATCH cx_bo_error INTO DATA(lx_bo_error). 
RAISE EXCEPTION TYPE cx_swf_flex_ifs_run_exception EXPORTING previous = lx_bo_error. ENDTRY. ENDIF. TRY. io_context->get_task_container( )->set( EXPORTING 
name = 'dummy' 
value = 'A' 
). 
CATCH cx_swf_cnt_cont_access_denied cx_swf_cnt_elem_access_denied cx_swf_cnt_elem_not_found cx_swf_cnt_elem_type_conflict cx_swf_cnt_unit_type_conflict cx_swf_cnt_elem_def_invalid cx_swf_cnt_container INTO DATA(lx_container_write). 
RAISE EXCEPTION TYPE cx_swf_flex_ifs_run_exception EXPORTING previous = lx_container_write. 
ENDTRY.

entry.title: Re: change in URL to "vhcal<SID>ci/cs" during call IC Web...
entry.content: Hi Joerg,

entry.title: User Id level authorization for the monitor report change attributes
entry.content:
How to control user id level authorization for the Monitor report option change attributes


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: User Id level authorization for the monitor report ch...
entry.content:
You can control the authorization for change attributes, There is a authorization methods for monitor,

AUTHORITY-CHECK OBJECT '/SCWM/MO'
      ID '/SCWM/LGNU' FIELD iv_lgnum
      ID '/SCWM/MONI' FIELD iv_monitor
      ID '/SCWM/OBCL' FIELD ls_method_def-obcls
      ID '/SCWM/METH' FIELD ls_method_def-method.

The check is in the code:  /SCWM/CL_WME_MONITOR_DB -> GET_METHODS

If the user has no rights then the method won't be displayed.

entry.title: Re: List Report: external navigation with parameters not...
entry.content:
Hi @MioYasutake ,

did you manage to find a solution on this? I'm stuck in the same situation: parameter are always passed as strings and are not evaluated.

Also this thread is referring to the same problem https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/app-to-app-external-navigation-binding-configuration/qaq-p/12335821

Thanks!

Chiara

entry.title: Re: Submissions for "SAP HANA Cloud multi-model" developer challenge: Week 2 - Words as Ve
entry.content:
Excellent exercise - maybe too easy as the notebooks were super cool and prompt (too perfect) 😀

Only one query had an error (i am investigating the error in my account). I loaded 3m records on my BTP internal tenant (not trial... )

workspaces-ws-476rm
 
 
* hana://userkey=myDevChallenger (hdbcli.dbapi.OperationalError) (4, 'cannot allocate enough memory: Allocation failed; Reason: configured statement memory limit from global configuration reached (SAP Note 3191224)') [SQL: SELECT RN, WORD, RELATED_WORD, SIMILARITY_SCORE, L2DISTANCE FROM ( SELECT B.WORD AS WORD, A.WORD AS RELATED_WORD, COSINE_SIMILARITY(A.WV, B.WV) AS SIMILARITY_SCORE, L2DISTANCE(A.WV, B.WV) AS L2DISTANCE, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY B.WORD ORDER BY COSINE_SIMILARITY(A.WV, B.WV) DESC) AS RN FROM "DEVCHALLENGER"."GOOGLE_NEWS" A, (SELECT WV, WORD FROM "DEVCHALLENGER"."GOOGLE_NEWS" WHERE WORD IN ('cat', 'CAT')) B WHERE A.WORD <> B.WORD ) AS RankedWords WHERE RN <= 5 ORDER BY WORD DESC, SIMILARITY_SCORE DESC;] (Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/e3q8)

entry.title: Re: Submissions for "SAP HANA Cloud multi-model" developer challenge: Week 2 - Words as Ve
entry.content: If Rome has pasta, Athens has noodles...

entry.title: Re: change in URL to "vhcal<SID>ci/cs" during call IC Web...
entry.content: Hi Joerg, there is a small addendum to this topic for the URL adjustment. In table "CRMV_IC_BORADM" you can change the assignment (Url) for logical systems like S4C_FIORI. Best regards, Joerg

entry.title: Re: Messages in RAP List Report
entry.content:
I solved the problem by using the parameter %global of the reported structure.

But I notice that this parameter is not available in all versions
